_comment: Testnet feeds for the self-hosted xoxno-oracle-adapter (make testnet configureOracleFeeds). feed_id must match the off-chain bot (xoxno-lending-functions devnet/stellar-bot-config priceJobs[].pairs). RWA assets use tag=Other with plain tickers as placeholders for submit/aggregate/read smoke tests (no known Stellar testnet deployments). Production mappings and sourcing: configs/mainnet/oracle_feeds.json.
_windows_comment: Applied by `make testnet configureOracleWindows` / `upgradeOracleAdapterFull`. max_submission_age_seconds is the tight aggregation inclusion window. max_stale_seconds is the cache TTL. max_relative_skew_seconds defaults to the inclusion window (900).
